prompt: Build a d=3 rotated surface code circuit from scratch with 3 rounds of syndrome extraction, verify fault distance is 3, use uniform depolarizing noise at p=0.001.

assertions.name: script_runs_successfully
assertions.description: The Python script exits without errors

assertions.name: correct_qubit_count
assertions.description: d=3 rotated surface code uses 17 qubits (9 data + 8 ancilla)

assertions.name: noise_inserted
assertions.description: Script applies depolarizing noise at p=0.001 before DEM/distance checks
